ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email for the company */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the company belongs to */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the company */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for sub-categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "views" TEXT /* Number of views for the company */,
  "view_period" TEXT /* Time period over which the views were recorded */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Revenue generated */,
  "conversion_rate" TEXT /* Conversion rate (percentage of views that result in a sale) */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance metric */,
  "average_order_value" TEXT /* Average order value */,
  "bounce_rate" TEXT /* Bounce rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., store owner, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_company_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-company mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the mapping was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_company_mapping_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_company_mapping_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the metric */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view metrics, edit data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the mapping was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Date the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service being integrated */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the integration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the integration was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integrations_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)
